message.content:
REVIEWED_FILES_COUNT: 20
REVIEWED_FILES: README.md | START-HERE.md | INSTALL.md | EXAMPLE-TOUR.md | JUDGE-QUICKSTART.md | FAQ.md | SAFETY-AND-SCOPE.md | DATA-AND-PRIVACY.md | TERMS-OF-USE.md | SECURITY.md | SUPPORT.md | ATTRIBUTION.md | LICENSE.md | TRADEMARKS.md | NOTICE.md | CONTRIBUTING.md | BUILD-WEEK.md | RELEASE-NOTES-v0.1.5.md | VERIFICATION-v0.1.5.md | ARCHIVE-CUSTODY.md
MATERIAL_DOCUMENTATION_FINDINGS_COUNT: 0
ALL_REQUIRED_CUSTOMER_MOMENTS_AND_SAFETY_BOUNDARIES_INSPECTED: yes
PASS_EVIDENCE_ORIENTATION: README.md | START-HERE.md :: The README and START-HERE documents provide clear onboarding, explaining purpose, scope, and initial steps, ensuring users understand the product’s intent and basic usage.
PASS_EVIDENCE_INSTALLATION: INSTALL.md :: INSTALL.md offers step‑by‑step instructions for all supported installation methods, detailing prerequisites, commands, and troubleshooting tips to achieve a fully functional local skill environment.
PASS_EVIDENCE_FIRST_VALUE: EXAMPLE-TOUR.md | JUDGE-QUICKSTART.md :: EXAMPLE-TOUR.md and JUDGE-QUICKSTART.md showcase practical use cases, guiding users through example scenarios that illustrate how the system processes data and generates actionable artifacts.
PASS_EVIDENCE_NORMAL_USE: FAQ.md | SAFETY-AND-SCOPE.md :: FAQ.md and SAFETY-AND-SCOPE.md collectively address common questions and clarify operational boundaries, ensuring users remain within safe, compliant, and well‑documented practices.
PASS_EVIDENCE_RECOVERY: SUPPORT.md :: SUPPORT.md provides comprehensive troubleshooting guidance, contact information, and escalation paths, enabling users to recover from installation or runtime issues efficiently.
PASS_EVIDENCE_PRIVACY_SECURITY: DATA-AND-PRIVACY.md | TERMS-OF-USE.md | SECURITY.md :: DATA-AND-PRIVACY.md, TERMS-OF-USE.md, and SECURITY.md collectively explain data handling policies, user responsibilities, and security safeguards, ensuring compliance with privacy and safety standards.
PASS_EVIDENCE_EVIDENCE_LIMITS: VERIFICATION-v0.1.5.md :: VERIFICATION-v0.1.5.md documents the scope of automated tests, clarifying which behaviors are verified and explicitly stating untested areas to avoid over‑reliance.
PASS_EVIDENCE_SUPPORT_MAINTENANCE: SUPPORT.md | RELEASE-NOTES-v0.1.5.md :: SUPPORT.md and RELEASE-NOTES-v0.1.5.md together outline maintenance procedures, update instructions, and release notes, guiding users through safe version transitions, ensuring continuity and minimizing downtime.
PASS_EVIDENCE_RIGHTS_PROVENANCE: ATTRIBUTION.md | LICENSE.md | TRADEMARKS.md | NOTICE.md | CONTRIBUTING.md | BUILD-WEEK.md :: ATTRIBUTION.md, LICENSE.md, TRADEMARKS.md, NOTICE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and BUILD-WEEK.md collectively establish legal rights, attribution requirements, trademark usage, and contribution guidelines for responsible reuse.
PASS_EVIDENCE_ARCHIVE_CUSTODY: ARCHIVE-CUSTODY.md :: ARCHIVE-CUSTODY.md details the structure, hash integrity, and extraction parity of all release artifacts, ensuring verifiable provenance and consistent deployment across platforms.
UNEXECUTED_CONDITIONS: fresh Codex marketplace installation | plugin discovery and task activation | live resource loading | script execution under customer permissions | live Claude upload and activation | broad repeated-model behavior | cultivation-field fitness | production reliability | jurisdictional currency | legal and compliance review | equipment integration | browser and keyboard testing | screen-reader testing | localization testing | representative-user testing | accessibility conformance | official OpenAI Plugins Directory appearance | accountable publication approval | customer outcomes

REVIEW_PASS_WITH_CONDITIONS
